protein_name: Probable guanine nucleotide exchange factor (GEF), which may be involved in the secretion process. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: guanyl-nucleotide exchange factor activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: negative regulation of protein secretion; signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: deafness locus associated putative guanine nucleotide exchange factor; Deafness locus-associated putative guanine nucleotide exchange factor; DELGEF; GNEFR; Guanine nucleotide exchange factor-related protein; secretion regulating guanine nucleotide exchange factor; Secretion-regulating guanine nucleotide exchange factor; SERGEF; SRGEF
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.01 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
